servers.name: dms
servers.comment: Dealer Management System MCP server. Exposes: get_service_slots, book_service_appointment, get_inventory, book_test_drive

servers.name: salesforce
servers.comment: Salesforce MCP server. Run: uvicorn providers.salesforce.server:app --port 8083. Requires SF_CLIENT_ID, SF_CLIENT_SECRET env vars.

_comment: name        - identifier used in registry tool_map
url         - base URL of the MCP server
api_key_env - env var containing the API key (injected as X-API-Key header)
book_service_appointment(name, phone, date, time, service_type, vehicle)           -> {confirmation_id, ...}
get_inventory(make, model, year, trim)                                             -> [{stock_num, color, price, mileage}]
For local dev, run a mock MCP server:
sf_create_lead(last_name, first_name?, company?, email?, phone?, lead_source?, description?)  -> {id, success}
sf_create_contact(last_name, first_name?, email?, phone?, account_id?, title?)               -> {id, success}
sf_create_opportunity(name, close_date, stage?, account_id?, amount?)                        -> {id, success}
sf_create_account(name, phone?, industry?, type?, billing_city?)                             -> {id, success}
